expectations.text: Output includes check for IP forwarding (/proc/sys/net/ipv4/ip_forward or sysctl)
expectations.evidence: Agent summary: '2. IP forwarding disabled on Proxmox host (/proc/sys/net/ipv4/ip_forward)' — kontrol komutu mevcut

expectations.text: Output includes iptables NAT table inspection command
expectations.evidence: Agent summary: '3. No NAT/masquerade iptables rule for the 10.10.1.0/24 subnet' — nat tablosu kontrolü mevcut

expectations.text: Output identifies missing MASQUERADE rule as a likely cause
expectations.evidence: Agent summary: 'Most likely root cause: explicit NAT (POSTROUTING masquerade) + IP forwarding' açıkça belirtilmiş

expectations.text: Output follows a phased troubleshoot approach (read-only first, then fix)
expectations.evidence: 7 diagnostic area sıralı olarak verilmiş ama skill'in Phase 1/2/3/4 yapısı yok — diagnostics ve fixes karışık sunulmuş

expectations.text: Output includes verification commands after fix (ping, curl)
expectations.evidence: Agent summary: layered ping test decision table mevcut (gateway → 8.8.8.8 → google.com)

expectations.text: Output does NOT apply iptables changes without presenting them to user first
expectations.evidence: Sadece tanı ve fix komutları gösterilmiş, doğrudan çalıştırılmamış
